title: convolvulus micranthus
intro: Convolvulus micranthus is a type of flowering plant, also known as the small bindweed, belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Convolvulus micranthus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Convolvulus micranthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried forms, and is commonly used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
